evals.name: build-saas-landing-page
evals.prompt: build me a landing page for a SaaS product that helps restaurants manage online orders. the product is called OrderFlow. make it feel premium and modern, dark theme.
evals.expected_output: Should route to vision agent first to produce a creative brief (7 sections, design direction, what we say NO to), then ask user to confirm, then route to build agent to produce a complete HTML file with Apple HIG standards: spring animations, 8pt grid, semantic colors, dark mode, 44px touch targets, inline SVG icons (no emoji), prefers-reduced-motion support.

evals.name: fix-hover-animation
evals.prompt: the cards on my landing page have a weird jerky hover animation, they use ease-in-out and it feels robotic. can you fix them to feel more natural like apple.com?
evals.expected_output: Should route directly to animate agent (no vision needed). Should replace ease-in-out with spring physics or Apple's cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1). Should add translateY(-4px) + shadow increase on hover. Should add scale(0.97) on active/press. Must include prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

evals.name: accessibility-audit
evals.prompt: check my landing page for accessibility issues. I want it to pass WCAG 2.2 AA and work well with VoiceOver on Mac.
evals.expected_output: Should route directly to a11y agent. Should check: contrast ratios (4.5:1 text, 3:1 UI), focus-visible styles, keyboard navigation (Tab/Enter/Escape), semantic HTML (button not div), aria-labels on icon buttons, skip link, prefers-reduced-motion, touch targets 44px, heading hierarchy, alt text on images.

evals.name: review-existing-code
evals.prompt: I just finished building this dashboard component. can you review it and tell me what's wrong with it from an Apple HIG perspective?
evals.expected_output: Should route directly to review agent. Should run the full checklist: physics & motion, visual craft, interaction, accessibility, structure. Should report pass/fail per category with specific line numbers and fixes. Should auto-fix simple issues.

evals.name: improve-existing-section
evals.prompt: the hero section of my landing page looks too plain. add some visual depth — maybe floating gradient orbs, a noise texture overlay, and make the headline text have a subtle gradient shimmer animation.
evals.expected_output: Should route directly to build agent (fixing/improving existing code, no vision needed). Should use techniques from visual-rules.md: CSS gradient orbs with filter:blur(80px), SVG feTurbulence noise overlay at 3% opacity, CSS background-clip gradient text with animation. All with prefers-reduced-motion fallback and dark mode support.
